props.name: alertType
props.desc: Determines the alert colour and icon.

props.name: banner
props.desc: When true, renders the alert as a full-width banner with no border radius.

props.name: closable
props.desc: Show a close button that dismisses the alert.

props.name: icon
props.desc: Custom Ant Design icon name shown in the alert (overrides the default type icon).

props.name: marquee
props.desc: Scroll the alert text as a marquee.

props.name: showIcon
props.desc: Show the default icon for the alert type.

props.name: text
props.desc: Alert message text.

props.name: href
props.desc: URL the link navigates to.

props.name: content
props.desc: Text content displayed as the link label.

props.name: target
props.desc: Browsing context for the link.

props.name: download
props.desc: When set, the link triggers a file download using this value as the filename.

props.name: direction
props.desc: Flex direction for child content.

props.name: hasChildren
props.desc: When true, the link renders child components inside it.

props.name: justifyContent
props.desc: CSS justify-content for the link flex container.

props.name: alignItems
props.desc: CSS align-items for the link flex container.

props.name: justifyItems
props.desc: CSS justify-items for the link flex container.

props.name: value
props.desc: The value to display. Accepts a number or string.

props.name: precision
props.desc: Number of decimal places to show. Must be a non-negative integer.

props.name: title
props.desc: Label displayed above the value.

props.name: prefix
props.desc: Text displayed before the value.

props.name: prefixIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "RiseOutlined").

props.name: suffix
props.desc: Text displayed after the value.

props.name: suffixIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "RiseOutlined").

props.name: titleFont
props.desc: Font configuration. Matches font-config shape plus an optional transform (CSS text-transform).

props.name: valueFont
props.desc: Font configuration. Matches font-config shape plus an optional transform (CSS text-transform).

props.name: titleStyle
props.desc: Inline CSS style string applied to the title.

props.name: valueStyle
props.desc: Inline CSS style string applied to the value.

props.name: textType
props.desc: HTML element to render — span (inline), paragraph (block), or title (heading).

props.name: content
props.desc: Static text content to display.

props.name: contentDisplay
props.desc: Whether to display the content value or the propertyName.

props.name: contentType
props.desc: Ant Design typography colour preset.

props.name: dataType
props.desc: How the bound value is formatted before display. date-time uses dateFormat; number uses numberFormat; boolean renders as Yes/No.

props.name: dateFormat
props.desc: Moment.js format string applied when dataType is date (e.g. "DD/MM/YYYY").

props.name: numberFormat
props.desc: Format applied when dataType is "number".

props.name: level
props.desc: Heading level (1–5) or a font-size token (e.g. "text-lg"). Only used when textType is "title".

props.name: value
props.desc: Dynamic bound value — overrides content when present.

props.name: code
props.desc: Render as inline code.

props.name: copyable
props.desc: Show a copy-to-clipboard button.

props.name: delete
props.desc: Apply strikethrough.

props.name: ellipsis
props.desc: Truncate overflowing text with an ellipsis.

props.name: italic
props.desc: Italicise the text.

props.name: keyboard
props.desc: Render styled as a keyboard key.

props.name: mark
props.desc: Highlight with a yellow background.

props.name: strong
props.desc: Bold the text.

props.name: underline
props.desc: Underline the text.
